title: MoreOres+
description: A mod which adds new ores into your game.
body:
# MoreOres+
![Mod Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b30033514bd923fd2971945838f4fb4cc6619a0c.png)

## Join MoreOres+ Official [Discord](https://discord.gg/ybqYpxXFe) Server

---

Check out my new mod:

- [Talents (CurseForge)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/talents-fabric)
- [Talents (Modrinth)](https://modrinth.com/mod/talents)

![Modrinth Downloads](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/dt/moreores+?color=brightgreen&label=Downloads&style=for-the-badge)
![Modrinth Followers](https://img.shields.io/modrinth/followers/moreores+?color=blue&label=Followers&style=for-the-badge)
[![Join Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-Join%20Server-purple?style=for-the-badge)](https://discord.gg/ybqYpxXFe)

Dive into a world of precious gemstones, advanced machinery, and powerful gear with MoreOres+!

---

# Tier I Gemstones

Discover 12 unique Tier I gemstones:

- Ruby
- Sapphire
- Green Sapphire
- Blue Garnet
- Pink Garnet
- Green Garnet
- Kyawthuite
- Topaz
- White Topaz
- Peridot
- Jade
- Pyrope

Each gemstone includes:
- Ore and Deepslate Ore variants
- Raw gemstone variants
- Polishing support using the Gem Purifier

---

# Tier II Gemstones

Advance further using the **Gem Infusion Block** to create powerful Tier II gemstones.

## Tier II Gems

- Alexandrite
- Kashmir Sapphire
- Crystallite
- Crimson Garnet
- Radiant Amethyst
- Limestone
- Moonstone
- Quartsidian
- Orange Zircon
- Opal
- Grandidierite
- Red Beryl

---

# Armor & Tools

Craft and upgrade powerful equipment sets.

## Armor Sets
- Ruby Armor
- Sapphire Armor
- Radiant Armor

## Tool Sets
- Ruby Tools
- Sapphire Tools
- Radiant Tools

Enhance Netherite gear using the **Ruby Upgrade Smithing Template**.

Gemstone trims and the **Guardian Armor Trim** add additional customization options.

## Radiant Armor Effects

The full **Radiant Armor Set** grants powerful permanent effects while worn:

- Health Boost X
- Regeneration III

These effects remain active indefinitely as long as the full armor set is equipped.

---

# Gem Purifier

Use the **Gem Purifier** to polish raw gemstones into refined variants.

## Features
- Energy handling system
- Dedicated input/output slots
- Fuel support
- Additional storage slots

## Supported Fuel
- Energy Ingots
- Energy Blocks

Learn how to use the Gem Purifier:

[Gem Purifier Wiki](https://github.com/CobraGamingSj/MoreOres-Fabric-1.21/wiki/Gem-Polisher)

![Gem Purifier Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/310ede3962891fe6a671afa137b9f4c5e7da66a4.png)

---

# Gem Infusion Block

The **Gem Infusion Block** is an advanced Tier II machine used to infuse gemstones using Radiant energy.

## Crafting Recipe

```text
R E R
I G I
I I I
```

### Legend
- `R` = Redstone Dust
- `E` = Energy Ingot or Energy Block
- `G` = Gem Purifier
- `I` = Iron Block

## Features
- Supports up to **10,000 Radiant Dust particles**
- Each **Radiant Dust** item provides **2,000 particles**
- Dedicated energy system
- Separate gemstone and catalyst slots
- Supports both Radiant and Obsidian infusions

## Crystallization Recipes

| InputBefore | InputAfter | Result |
|---|---|---|
| Ruby | Radiant | Alexandrite |
| Sapphire | Radiant | Kashmir Sapphire |
| Green Sapphire | Radiant | Crystallite |
| Blue Garnet | Radiant | Crimson Garnet |
| Pink Garnet | Radiant | Radiant Amethyst |
| Green Garnet | Radiant | Limestone |
| Kyawthuite | Radiant | Painite |
| White Topaz | Radiant | Moonstone |
| Quartz | Obsidian | Quartsidian |
| Peridot | Radiant | Opal |
| Jade | Radiant | Grandidierite |
| Pyrope | Radiant | Red Beryl |

---

# Radiant Dust & Energy System

Radiant Dust powers the particle system of the Gem Infusion Block.

## Energy Ingot Interaction
- Right-clicking a Radiant Block using an Energy Ingot summons lightning
- After 4-7 lightning strikes, the block breaks
- The block drops Radiant Dust

---

# World Features

Explore new world content including:
- Gemstone ores
- Deepslate gemstone ores
- Advanced crafting systems
- Jeweller Villager profession
- Guardian Armor Trim

##  LootTables

| Key | Item | Rarity | Count |
|---|---|---|---|
| Jungle Pyramid | Ruby Template | 50% | 1 |
| Elder Guardian | Guardian Armor Trim | 0.25% | 1 |
| Village Toolsmith Chest | Ruby | 5% | 1, 2 |
| Village Toolsmith Chest | Radiant | 0.15% | 1, 2 |
| Village Toolsmith Chest | Green Garnet | 1.5% | 1, 2 |
| Village Toolsmith Chest | Sapphire | 5% | 1, 2 |
| Village Toolsmith Chest | Topaz | 5% | 1, 2 |
| Village Toolsmith Chest | Pyrope | 0.5% | 1, 2 |

---

# Jeweller Villager

Trade gemstones and advanced materials using the new **Jeweller** villager profession, created using the Gem Purifier workstation.
